Our Team

We've assembled a team of compassionate, talented medical professionals with deep ties to the Bryan, College Station community. We've been intentional to find staff who will genuinely care about your physical, emotional and spiritual health.

  • Rusty Bacak, MD

  • Hope Odom, FNP-C

  • Catherine Miller, PA-C

  • Karen Collins, Practice Manager

  • Jenn Weltens, RN to RN/Referrals

  • Laura Williford, RN

  • Ayme Rodriguez, Phlebotomist

  • Britney Brandenburg, MA/Prior Authorization

  • Daya Ponce, Reception

  • Sarah Boreen, Reception

  • Jessalyn Rodriguez, Check In MA

  • Cidney Wash, Student Worker/MA

Contact us

To schedule an appointment, call 979-695-3570.

2911 Texas Ave. South, Suite 202
College Station, TX 77845

Hours

  • Monday — Thursday 8:00am to 5:00pm
  • Friday 8:00am to 2:00pm
  • Lunch hours M to Th, 12-1. On Fridays, there is no lunch break.
